name: Volnus
description: Tear and maim with this agile, lightweight glass hammer. When Gara's wields her signature melee weapon, it gains additional Slam Radial Damage.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.name: Argon Crystal
components.description:
A Void based radioactive resource that decays every day it is out of the Void.

Location: Missions in the Void

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Tear and maim with this agile, lightweight glass hammer. When Gara's wields her signature melee weapon, it gains additional Slam Radial Damage.

components.name: Cryotic
components.description:
Usually found in extreme sub-zero environments, Cryotic instantly freezes anything it contacts.

Location: Excavation Missions on Venus, Earth, Phobos, Europa, and Neptune

components.name: Oxium
components.description:
Oxium is a rare lighter than air alloy of Orokin origin, used in certain Corpus Robotics.

Location: Venus, Jupiter, Mars, Neptune, Pluto, Eris, Europa, and Lua.

patchlogs.name: Update 31: The New War
patchlogs.changes: Removed Tenet Livia, Primary Kitgun beam-based weapons, Cadus, and Volnus Prime from the Conclave.

patchlogs.name: The Old Blood: Hotfix 26.0.3
patchlogs.changes: Changed the Volnus Blocking to 100% and Parry Angle to 50.

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Update 24.5.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed incorrect mesh pieces when equipping the Hammers Palatine Skin on the Volnus.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Update 23
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Volnus preview model rotating in the wrong direction when building in the foundry.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Hotfix 22.20.8 + 22.20.8.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Volnus being rotated the wrong way when building it in the Foundry.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.0.8
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a placeholder tag that appeared when using the Volnus.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.0.6 + 22.0.6.1
patchlogs.changes: The Volnus is now usable in Conclave!
